# 43 Sunsets

> 43 Sunsets builds small, production-grade automations for real businesses. Every template ships with error handling, idempotency guards, and clear setup notes — because "it runs" and "it's ready" are different things.

43 Sunsets is an independent one-person automation studio near Chicago, run by a builder with twenty years of experience in sales and operations systems between Japan and the United States. Products are published on established marketplaces (n8n template library, Agensi, Apify Store, Etsy); this site is the studio's home page and directory.

## Free n8n templates (official n8n library)

- [Google Reviews — AI Reply Drafts](https://n8n.io/workflows/16889): Watches Gmail for Google's review alerts and drafts a reply following Google's moderation rules. Nothing is posted automatically — the owner approves every word.
- [Quote Follow-up Sequences](https://n8n.io/workflows/16975): Follow up on quotes at day 3, 7 and 14 with Gmail + Google Sheets. Sequence state lives in the sheet, so re-runs and crashes never double-send.
- [Receipt → Expense Ledger](https://n8n.io/workflows/16983): Reads receipts from an inbox (PDFs and photos, via AI extraction) into a Google Sheets ledger, idempotently, with monthly summaries.
- [Google Review Request Emails](https://n8n.io/workflows/17059): Asks happy customers for a Google review two days after job completion, plus one polite reminder — never more.

## AI agent skills (Agensi)

- [n8n Production-Readiness Auditor ($12)](https://www.agensi.io/skills/n8n-production-readiness-auditor): Audits an n8n workflow export across 10 categories (error handling, credential hygiene, idempotency, rate limits, webhook security, timeouts, observability, data handling, naming, cost traps) and returns a graded report with exact node-level fixes.
- [API Breaking-Change Detector ($12)](https://www.agensi.io/skills/api-breaking-change-detector): Compares API spec versions and flags breaking changes — removed endpoints, changed types, tightened auth.

## Tools & guides

- [GEO / AI-Visibility Site Audit (Apify, pay per report)](https://apify.com/43sunsets/ai-visibility-site-audit): Audits how visible a site is to AI assistants — robots.txt rules for 13 AI crawlers, llms.txt, structured data, meta hygiene — with a scored report and a ready-to-edit llms.txt draft.
- [n8n Workflow Production-Readiness Checklist, printable PDF ($3.99, Etsy)](https://the43sunsets.etsy.com): The same 10-point audit as the agent skill, as a 2-page printable PDF with 30 concrete checkboxes and a scoring guide.
